Bodytext.67108945: "Incoming video frames from the first input are cached and indexed according to the frame index coming in on the second input. The second input expects a single channel of the name \"frame_stream\". The third input expects a single channel of the name \"frame_sync\"" "'This NDI In component is a wrapper for the NDI In TOP.  It adds features for extracting timecode and conversion to a frame index as well as signal validation and a backup source image that outputs a blue signal when no input is attached.'"
